title: 3D Pumpkin Pie
description: A very simple pack, making pumpkin pies 3D in item frames, like cake!
body:
# 3D Pumpkin Pie

This is an extremely simple resourcepack. The pack allows pumpkin pies to have a 3D model whenever it is placed in an item frame, making it look like a block similar to cakes!

_The pack is compatible with my other pack [Hattables++](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/hattables++) (where the model comes from), but will require this pack to be placed above Hattables in priority._

![3D Pie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/271f15c0a4afa9fa239ee3c218020ca0dc7e8efe_0.webp)
_If you have any issues, join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/wDE9TBwwdN) for support!_
